name: arduino-mcp-server
description: MCP server for Arduino CLI setup, board detection, compile/upload workflows, serial sessions, and board reference lookup.
long_description: Arduino MCP Server provides safe, structured access to arduino-cli for setup, board detection, compile/upload, serial monitoring, and board metadata workflows.

arduino_cli_path.title: Arduino CLI Path
arduino_cli_path.description: Path or command name for arduino-cli.

arduino_sketch_root.title: Sketch Root
arduino_sketch_root.description: Optional absolute directory that limits sketch compile/upload paths.

tools.name: arduino_cli_doctor
tools.description: Check whether arduino-cli is available and return installation guidance when missing.

tools.name: install_arduino_cli
tools.description: Install arduino-cli using platform-specific package manager or script options.

tools.name: detect_hardware
tools.description: Detect connected hardware and infer likely board and FQBN candidates.

tools.name: ensure_core_installed
tools.description: Ensure the required Arduino core is installed, with optional automatic installation.

tools.name: compile_sketch
tools.description: Compile an Arduino sketch for a specific board FQBN.

tools.name: upload_sketch
tools.description: Upload a sketch to a connected board and serial port.

tools.name: upload_and_wait_ready
tools.description: Upload a sketch and wait for a serial readiness pattern after reboot.

tools.name: read_serial_snapshot
tools.description: Capture serial output from a port for a bounded duration.

tools.name: safety_preflight
tools.description: Run an electrical safety preflight check before write or upload actions.

tools.name: serial_open_session
tools.description: Open a stateful serial session with coordinated port locking.

tools.name: serial_list_sessions
tools.description: List active serial sessions and current lock ownership.

tools.name: serial_read
tools.description: Read buffered bytes from an active serial session.

tools.name: serial_expect
tools.description: Wait for a text pattern in a serial session buffer with timeout.

tools.name: serial_write
tools.description: Write bytes to a serial session with safety preflight enforcement.

tools.name: serial_close_session
tools.description: Close an active serial session and release its lock.

tools.name: list_connected_boards
tools.description: List connected Arduino boards and serial ports detected by arduino-cli.

tools.name: list_supported_boards
tools.description: List installable board definitions from the local Arduino index.

tools.name: list_serial_ports
tools.description: List serial ports and any board metadata detected by arduino-cli.

tools.name: get_board_details
tools.description: Fetch detailed board metadata for a given FQBN.

tools.name: list_board_reference
tools.description: List local board reference entries with pin and spec metadata.

tools.name: search_board_reference
tools.description: Search board reference entries by board name, alias, id, or FQBN.

prompts.name: arduino-cli-bootstrap-policy
prompts.description: Strict setup policy to bootstrap missing arduino-cli installations.
prompts.text: Run arduino_cli_doctor first, install Arduino CLI if missing, set ARDUINO_CLI_PATH when needed, re-check until installed, then continue with detect/compile/upload tools.

prompts.name: arduino-setup-assistant
prompts.description: Template prompt for board wiring and upload guidance.
prompts.text: Given a board and sensor/module, produce safe wiring, voltage notes, a minimal sketch, and compile/upload steps via arduino-cli.
